title: Publisher Confirms, Windows, Failure Ambiguity, and Republish · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs publisher confirms, windows, failure ambiguity, and republish from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the confirm-window and ambiguous-publication ledger. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for confirm-window and ambiguous-publication ledger after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evide…
objectives: Use confirm channels and account for callback results, waitForConfirms, nack, return ordering, close, and unresolved publication state.
Bound unconfirmed count, bytes, and age while preserving throughput, memory, fairness, and per-message outcome evidence.
Explain when confirms occur for unroutable messages, persistent classic queues, quorum queues, and multiple routed queues.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Publisher Ledger Cleanup
steps.instruction:
review case — A review messaging team handles case 1276 in a quorum queue during a planned rolling maintenance window. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to bound the confirm window and preserve ambiguity when a channel closes before proof; prove topology rollback before deleting the old binding; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Retire confirmed entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove zero memory or callback leaks across channel generations.

Inspect the Publisher Ledger Cleanup trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Publisher Ledger Cleanup.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for retire confirmed entries, reject nacked entries, preserve ambiguous entries, cancel waiters, and prove zero memory or callback leaks across channel generations. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Separate evidence from confidence · Review Publisher Ledger Cleanup, keep Publisher Ledger Cleanup connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.
